2 min read
Just now

--

Right now, the World Cup is the biggest trend on the internet. Millions of eyeballs are glued to screens, and smart creators are cashing in. In fact, faceless channels are making thousands of dollars a week simply by posting soccer shorts.
But there is a massive trap most beginners fall into: downloading broadcast footage and re-uploading it. If you try to rip clips from major sports networks, YouTube will hit you with a copyright strike and ban your channel instantly.
So, how are top creators riding this massive trend without getting banned?
They are using cutting-edge AI tools to generate their own viral, 100% copyright-free content. Here is the exact step-by-step strategy to build an automated faceless business using AI soccer shorts.
The Secret AI Tool for Copyright-Free Viral Videos
Most people think ElevenLabs is just a platform for AI voiceovers. But they recently released a massive stealth update that completely changes the game for faceless channels.
ElevenLabs has directly integrated Kling AI into their dashboard, transforming it from a voice tool into a full-blown video-generation studio. This allows you to create hyper-realistic, cinematic video clips from thin air in under two minutes.
Step-by-Step: Creating Your AI Soccer Shorts
Ready to make money online with this strategy? Here is exactly how to execute it:

• Step 1: Access the Studio. Log inside your ElevenLabs dashboard and click on the brand-new ‘Image and Video’ tab.

• Step 2: Write a Descriptive Prompt. The secret to great AI video is in the details. Type something like: “Cinematic slow motion of a professional soccer player kicking a winning goal under bright stadium lights, 4k resolution.”

• Step 3: Generate and Download. Hit generate. In seconds, you’ll have a stunning, high-quality video clip that is 100% copyright-free.

• Step 4: Edit for Virality. Drop your downloaded clip into CapCut, add a trending World Cup audio track, and export your short.
How to Turn Viral Views into Automated Income
Generating the video is the easy part. But views alone don’t pay the bills. If you want to turn this traffic into actual automated income, you need the right business infrastructure.
To monetize effectively, you need a system for automated Instagram DMs and a seamless way to sell digital products on autopilot.
